calendar.matters:
Motion To Compel Deposition Of Wendy Fung
Off Calendar Sep-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Daniel C. Walsh of Gilbert Kelly Crowley & Jennett (213-615-7067) appears as counsel for petitioner/moving party, Government Employees Insurance Company

Attorney, Steven W. Yuen of Heath & Yuen (415-622-7064) appears as counsel for non-party deponent/opposing party, Wendy Fung

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Compel Deposition Of Wendy Fung is GRANTED. The court adopts the substance of the judge pro tem's recommendation and thus GRANT the motion. Evidence Code 973(b) provides that there is no Evidence Code 971 spousal privilege when a married person brings a civil action for the benefit "of himself and his spouse." Stephen Heath and his spouse (Wendy Fung) seek to evade 973(b) with identically worded declarations that Fung supposedly "assigned, quit claimed, released, and surrendered" her "community property rights." However, no other information - any document, a date of the putative quit claim, any of its circumstances or other terms, etc. - is provided. I reject this tactic. To permit it would allow circumvention of 973(b); it would be far too easy to putatively abjure community property rights via lawyer-crafted declarations, only to reverse course after the time for deposition or trial. The sanctions requests are DENIED. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Nancy E. Presant-McDonald, CSR 906, tel: 818-551-7300, email: abi@depo.com. (D302)

Motion To Compel Deposition Of Wendy Fung
Off Calendar Aug-26-2016 Continued To Sep-19-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Daniel C. Walsh, of Gilbert, Kelly, Crowley & Jennett LLP, Tel. 213.615.7067, for
petitioners;
Steven W. Yuen, of Heath & Yuen, Tel. 415.622.7064, for non-party Wendy Fung
Court Reporter: Nancy E. Presant-McDonald, CSR No. 9906, Tel. 818.551.7300.

Ruling: A R G U E D. Wendy Fung's (Non-party) counsel does not stipulate to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem. PETITIONER GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES INSURANCE COMPANY Motion To Compel Deposition Of Wendy Fung is continued to September 19, 2016, at 9:30 a.m., in Department 302, Law & Motion. Wendy Fung's counsel is informed that a $30. Court Reporter fee will be assessed and must be paid before the hearing date. Judge Pro Tem to prepare report and recommendation. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
